envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key. Created during agent registration; recoverable from simmer.markets/dashboard.

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: Set to 'polymarket' or 'kalshi' to default real-money trades to that venue. Omit (or set 'sim') for paper trading at real prices.
